chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الرَّجُلِ يَتَطَوَّعُ بِالصِّيَامِ وَ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ قَضَاءِ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 43 – The man Fasts voluntariliy, and upon him are the making up for the Fasts from a Month of Ramazan

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/318)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/318)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ عَلَيْهِ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ طَائِفَةٌ أَ يَتَطَوَّعُ فَقَالَ لَا حَتَّى يَقْضِيَ مَا عَلَيْهِ مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Ibn Abu Umeyr, from Hammad, from Al Halby who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the man upon who are a number of Fasts from a Month of Ramazan, can he Fast optional ones?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, until he makes up for what is upon him from a Month of Ramazan’.
en.sarwar: 2. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from ibn abu ‘ Umayr from Hammad from al-Halabiy who has said the following: “This is in regards to my question before abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who owes Qada’ (compensatory fast) of the month of Ramadan if he can fast optional fast. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, he cannot do so before he completing Qada’ (compensatory fast) of the month of Ramadan.’”
